name: repo-orchestrator
description: Orchestrate a repository's open work end-to-end: triage every open issue and pull request, classify and route each (merge, fix, review, triage, take-up, blocked) to the right pr-*/gh command or subagent, drive taken-up work through isolated worktrees and the dev agents, and loop until the board is in a known state. Merges PRs and starts new implementation only when explicitly authorized. Use to run repo triage and PR/issue operations continuously.
